name: Bazooka
description: The Bazooka is a Tediore rocket launcher that hits hard per shot, but its rockets travel slowly and suffer from wide spread, so you will need to lead moving targets. Reloading tosses the gun as an explosive; the blast scales with how much ammo is left in the magazine. It performs best at close to medium range where travel time is less of a drawback.
notes: A standard world drop from appropriate loot sources.
